source._note: Re-sourced from real OSM highway=raceway way 1134026181 at Fountain, CO (reversed to CW winding), resampled to 3 m via scripts.gps.from_track. Real 1.03-mi D-oval; elevation from USGS 3DEP (real ~2 m sunken bowl, do not flatten).

road_profile._doc: Real PPIR banking ~10 deg in the two turn arcs (outside edge up), flat on the straights. Arcs derived from the REVERSED+rotated (CCW, S/F at grandstand) centerline curvature: 231-666 m, 1007-1443 m of the 1649 m lap. bank_deg +10 (sign flipped vs the old CW ring - outside/inside swap when direction reverses); VERIFY outside-edge-up on first load, flip sign if it domes inward.

route._orientation_doc: Research 2026-07-20: PPIR oval raced COUNTERCLOCKWISE (NASCAR/IRL 1997-2005); S/F mid front stretch in front of the main grandstand (~38.5910,-104.6785), cars heading SSE. Our OSM ring was CW -> route.reverse. Cambers re-derived from curvature after reversal; bank sign flipped (+10) because outside/inside swap when direction reverses — verify outside-edge-up in Blender/game.
